document.source_title: IPL 2026 Points Table Today: SRH, GT qualify; CSK’s fate left in balance

claims.claim_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH) are through to the playoffs of the 2026 Indian Premier League (IPL).
claims.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH) are through to the playoffs of the 2026 Indian Premier League (IPL) after beating the Chennai Super Kings (CSK) by five wickets.

claims.claim_text: Chennai Super Kings (CSK) are among those hoping to make it to the playoffs.
claims.evidence_text: leaving just one spot now for the taking and Chennai Super Kings (CSK) among those hoping to make it.

entities.evidence_text: CSK are one of three teams on 12 points, which is just one lesser than fourth-placed Punjab Kings.

entities.evidence_text: One side, Kolkata Knight Riders, are on 11 points.

entities.evidence_text: the defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru, were the first team to qualify for the playoffs.
